summary: Comprehensive testing of Sugarcane Disease Analysis app - all core features working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly, navigation works, language toggle (EN/HI/MR) works, auth flows work.

issues: FIXED: Removed Confidence column from admin scans table per requirements (no confidence scores should be displayed)

critical_code_review_comments: Detection endpoint uses GPT-5.1 Vision which has budget constraints - consider caching or rate limiting for production
YOLO model returns 'None' for simple test images - may need more training data or lower confidence threshold
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup with credentials from backend/.env
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: Admin/User auth, Registration, Disease detection via GPT-5.1 Vision, History with thumbnails, Disease Library, Admin panel (stats/users/detections), Language toggle (EN/HI/MR), Logout. Detection uses real GPT-5.1 Vision API (not mocked). YOLO model loads but returns no detections for simple test images.

features_tested.user_login_after_registration: PASS - redirects to profile-setup then dashboard
features_tested.disease_detection: PASS - returns disease, severity, treatment, prevention, symptoms, syngenta_products (NO confidence)
features_tested.history_page: PASS - shows past scans with thumbnails
features_tested.disease_info_page: PASS - shows disease library with 18 diseases
features_tested.language_toggle: PASS - EN, Hindi, Marathi all work
features_tested.admin_panel: PASS - shows stats, users, detections (admin only)
features_tested.admin_access_control: PASS - regular users cannot see/access admin panel
features_tested.logout: PASS - clears session and redirects to login
features_tested.navigation: PASS - all nav links work correctly
